description:
The DebugHapticPoint component sends Force sensations to a haptic device as well as gets the name of the haptic device.

This works as part of the game's robust Haptics system.

fields.Intensity: Sends a sensation of force of this intensity to the Haptic device at ``Index``
fields.Index: The haptic device to send Intensity to and get a name for.
fields.Position: The name of the haptic device at ``Index``
